summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: added an opening callback to the Chapter 14 agreement and corrected an in-scene day reference so Chapter 15 now exits on Friday night, aligning with Chapter 16's Saturday morning opening. Core beats, voice, and causality were preserved.
edits: Added one opening sentence that ties the match context to the signed agreement from Priya's table.
Changed a check-in desk line from 'on Saturday' to 'this late on Friday' to remove a Chapter 15->16 timeline rewind.
